productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Samba Blue Casual Shoes
description: With a soft suede leather upper and gum rubber outsole, the Samba from adidas originals continues to remain as a favourite indoor classic shoe.This shoe comes with an extra pair of laces in contrast colour.UpperSuede upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot Lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with traingular grooves, suction points and a pivot point on the forefoot, and small terraced lugs on the backfoot for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careUse a suede brush and leather impregnation spray to clean the upperDo not store in direct sunlight
